description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a rectangular main structure and an adjacent detached section, likely a garage or guest room. The exterior walls are painted a muted green with white trim, and the roof is flat, providing a modern, streamlined appearance. Large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The property is surrounded by a variety of trees, including coniferous and deciduous types, as well as ornamental shrubs, enhancing its suburban character. The main entrance is accessible via a short walkway, and the grounds are landscaped with greenery and a driveway. The interior is partially visible, showing distinct rooms such as a living area, kitchen, and bedroom.
description: A modern, single-story green bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings featuring various trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and landscaped yard with several trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached section, possibly a garage, and a cluster of trees behind the main building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more trees, and the separation between the main building and the detached section.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the flat roof, visible interior rooms, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
